steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: Standard deviation is smallest when values cluster most tightly around the mean. Compare the range and spread of each dataset.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content: Enter each answer choice as a list in Desmos and compare `stdevp`. The smallest value belongs to choice D, because $46,47,47,47,48$ is clustered closest to $47$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content:
• A has standard deviation about $2.28$.
  • B has standard deviation about $1.79$.
  • C has standard deviation about $1.41$.
  • D has standard deviation about $0.63$, the smallest.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
